promptDescription: - **heatmap** — 2-D intensity matrix; ideal for time x category patterns (e.g. sales by month x territory). Spec: { "type":"heatmap", "title":"...", "xLabels":[...], "yLabels":[...], "data":[[xIdx,yIdx,value],...] }
renderScript: function(wrap,spec){var C=['#534AB7','#7F77DD','#2E9CDB','#4BC1A8','#E8833A','#E85858','#9B59B6','#27AE60','#F39C12','#1ABC9C','#3498DB','#E74C3C','#2ECC71','#F1C40F','#8E44AD'];function getT(){return{text:'#1a1a18',text2:'#5a5a56',grid:'rgba(0,0,0,0.06)'};}function load(url,g,cb){if(window[g]){cb();return;}for(var i=0;i<document.scripts.length;i++){if(document.scripts[i].src===url){if(document.scripts[i]._ld){cb();return;}document.scripts[i].addEventListener('load',cb);return;}}var s=document.createElement('script');s.src=url;s.onload=function(){s._ld=true;cb();};document.head.appendChild(s);}function buildOpt(sp){var t=getT();var titleOpt=sp.title?{text:sp.title,textStyle:{color:t.text,fontSize:13,fontWeight:'500'},left:'center',top:4}:undefined;switch(sp.type){case 'rose':return{color:C,title:titleOpt,tooltip:{trigger:'item',formatter:'{b}: {c} ({d}%)'},legend:{bottom:4,textStyle:{color:t.text2,fontSize:11}},series:[{type:'pie',roseType:'area',radius:['10%','70%'],center:['50%','52%'],data:sp.data||[],label:{color:t.text2,fontSize:11},emphasis:{itemStyle:{shadowBlur:10,shadowColor:'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'}}}]};case 'radar':return{color:C,title:titleOpt,tooltip:{},legend:{bottom:4,textStyle:{color:t.text2,fontSize:11}},radar:{indicator:sp.indicators||[],axisName:{color:t.text2,fontSize:11},splitLine:{lineStyle:{color:t.grid}},splitArea:{show:false},axisLine:{lineStyle:{color:t.grid}}},series:[{type:'radar',data:(sp.datasets||[]).map(function(ds,i){return{name:ds.label,value:ds.data,itemStyle:{color:C[i%C.length]},lineStyle:{color:C[i%C.length]},areaStyle:{opacity:0.15}};})}]};case 'heatmap':{var vals=(sp.data||[]).map(function(d){return d[2];});var minV=Math.min.apply(null,vals.concat([0]));var maxV=Math.max.apply(null,vals);return{title:titleOpt,tooltip:{position:'top',formatter:function(p){var x=(sp.xLabels||[])[p.data[0]];x=x!=null?x:p.data[0];var y=(sp.yLabels||[])[p.data[1]];y=y!=null?y:p.data[1];return y+', '+x+': '+p.data[2];}},grid:{top:titleOpt?50:24,bottom:60,left:80,right:30},xAxis:{type:'category',data:sp.xLabels||[],axisLabel:{color:t.text2,fontSize:11,rotate:30},splitArea:{show:true}},yAxis:{type:'category',data:sp.yLabels||[],axisLabel:{color:t.text2,fontSize:11},splitArea:{show:true}},visualMap:{min:minV,max:maxV,calculable:true,orient:'horizontal',left:'center',bottom:4,textStyle:{color:t.text2,fontSize:11},inRange:{color:['#EEF0FF','#534AB7']}},series:[{type:'heatmap',data:sp.data||[],emphasis:{itemStyle:{shadowBlur:10,shadowColor:'rgba(0,0,0,0.5)'}}}]};}case 'treemap':return{color:C,title:titleOpt,tooltip:{formatter:'{b}: {c}'},series:[{type:'treemap',top:titleOpt?44:10,bottom:10,left:10,right:10,data:sp.data||[],label:{show:true,fontSize:12,color:'#fff'},upperLabel:{show:true,height:28,color:'#fff',fontSize:12},itemStyle:{borderWidth:2},levels:[{itemStyle:{borderWidth:4,gapWidth:4}},{itemStyle:{borderWidth:2,gapWidth:2}}]}]};case 'sunburst':return{color:C,title:titleOpt,tooltip:{formatter:function(p){return p.name+': '+p.value;}},series:[{type:'sunburst',center:['50%','54%'],data:sp.data||[],radius:['10%','90%'],label:{fontSize:11,color:t.text},itemStyle:{borderWidth:1,borderColor:'rgba(255,255,255,0.2)'},emphasis:{focus:'ancestor'}}]};case 'parallel':{var dims=sp.dimensions||[];return{color:C,title:titleOpt,tooltip:{trigger:'item'},parallelAxis:dims.map(function(name,idx){return{dim:idx,name:name,nameTextStyle:{color:t.text2,fontSize:11},axisLabel:{color:t.text2,fontSize:10},axisLine:{lineStyle:{color:t.grid}},axisTick:{lineStyle:{color:t.grid}}};}),parallel:{top:titleOpt?60:40,bottom:40,left:60,right:60},series:[{type:'parallel',lineStyle:{width:1.5,opacity:0.7},data:(sp.data||[]).map(function(row,i){return{name:row.label,value:row.values,lineStyle:{color:C[i%C.length]}};})}]};}case 'sankey':{var sNodes=(sp.nodes||[]).map(function(n){return typeof n==='string'?{name:n}:n;});var sNames=new Set(sNodes.map(function(n){return n.name;}));var sLinks=(sp.links||[]).filter(function(l){return sNames.has(l.source)&&sNames.has(l.target);});return{title:titleOpt,tooltip:{trigger:'item',triggerOn:'mousemove'},series:[{type:'sankey',top:titleOpt?44:10,bottom:20,left:20,right:120,data:sNodes,links:sLinks,emphasis:{focus:'adjacency'},lineStyle:{color:'gradient',curveness:0.5,opacity:0.4},label:{color:t.text,fontSize:11},nodeWidth:20,nodeGap:12}]};}case 'funnel':return{color:C,title:titleOpt,tooltip:{trigger:'item',formatter:'{b}: {c} ({d}%)'},legend:{bottom:4,textStyle:{color:t.text2,fontSize:11}},series:[{type:'funnel',top:titleOpt?50:20,bottom:44,left:'8%',width:'84%',min:0,label:{show:true,position:'inside',color:'#fff',fontSize:12},itemStyle:{borderWidth:1},emphasis:{label:{fontSize:14}},data:sp.data||[]}]};default:throw new Error('Unknown ECharts type: '+sp.type);}}load('https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/echarts@5/dist/echarts.min.js','echarts',function(){if(!wrap.style.height)wrap.style.height='480px';wrap._chartSpec=spec;var option=buildOpt(spec);option.backgroundColor='#ffffff';var ec=echarts.init(wrap);ec.setOption(option);window.addEventListener('resize',function(){ec.resize();});});}
